title: senecio oligolobus
intro: Senecio oligolobus, also known as the annual groundsel, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family Asteraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, particularly its hepatotoxic and pyrrolizidine alkaloid content. The pyrrolizidine alkaloids in Senecio oligolobus have been reported to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may provide health benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved wound healing. However, it should be noted that the plant's toxicity and potential side effects may outweigh its benefits, and herbal preparations should only be used under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional.
